title: Flow-Induced Analgesia: A Conceptual Review of Biopsychosocial and Neurobiological Mechanisms of Pain Modulation.

assets.abstract: Chronic pain remains one of the leading causes of disability worldwide and is strongly influenced by attentional and cognitive-emotional factors such as catastrophizing and hypervigilance. While distraction techniques (eg, virtual reality, music) and mindfulness-based approaches are established adjuncts in pain management, the psychological construct of flow-a state of deep absorption and effortless concentration described by Csikszentmihalyi-has not yet been systematically explored in pain medi

phase_mapping.bridge_rationale: Water and pleasure — flow state, peak experience, aesthetic pleasure, reward systems, pleasure neuroscience, hedonic tone, musical pleasure.
